ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager Technical Reference: Source Energy, multiple web sources confirming grid electricity conversion factor
ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager Technical Reference: Source Energy, confirmed as national natural gas source-site ratio
ASHRAE Standard 189.1 specifies 1.19 for fuel oil; 1.01 is the CHP ratio for district steam systems. No direct Portfolio Manager documentation found confirming 1.01 for fuel oil.
ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager Technical Reference: Source Energy - weighted average of CHP (1.01) at 43% and conventional steam (1.35) at 57%
ENERGY STAR U.S. Energy Use Intensity by Property Type tables - national median source EUI for office buildings

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from NYC Local Law 84's 2022 benchmarking disclosure (publicly available on NYC Open Data portal). The EPA source energy conversion factors for electricity (2.80), natural gas (1.05), and district steam (1.20) are verified as standard ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager ratios. The ESTAR eligibility threshold of 148.1 kBtu/sqft is the confirmed national median source EUI for office buildings per ENERGY STAR benchmarks. The fuel oil conversion factor of 1.01 in the task metadata could not be independently verified from authoritative sources; ASHRAE Standard 189.1 specifies 1.19 for fuel oil instead.
